tasks.subject: Task 1: Pure display helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the unit-tested pure functions the screen needs: `formatShortDate` (date), `picksLabel` and `pickerMeta` (turn meta lines).

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/lib/date.ts`
- Modify: `mobile/lib/date.test.ts`
- Modify: `mobile/lib/turn.ts`
- Modify: `mobile/lib/turn.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- formatShortDate("2026-05-30") === "May 30"
- picksLabel(1) === "1 pick"; picksLabel(2) === "2 picks"; picksLabel(0) === "0 picks"
- pickerMeta first-turn vs picked branches
- just test passes

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/date.ts", "mobile/lib/date.test.ts", "mobile/lib/turn.ts", "mobile/lib/turn.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["formatShortDate", "picksLabel", "pickerMeta", "just test passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Tonight home screen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rebuild `app/(tabs)/index.tsx` to fetch the turn and render the Spotlight hero, On deck list, and the three home actions.

**Files:**
- Modify (full rewrite): `mobile/app/(tabs)/index.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- fetchTurn on mount with AbortController; aborts on unmount
- loading/error/empty/loaded states with TopBar mounted
- hero: NEXT UP tag, 64px glow Avatar + RadialGradient halo, serif name, pickerMeta, RadialGradient wash
- On deck ranks 2-4 with picksLabel
- Plan a night routes to /night; skip + rotation inert
- just check passes

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/(tabs)/index.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fetchTurn on mount", "states", "hero", "on deck", "button wiring", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
